evals.expected_output: Use the hsts-checker skill for this hsts checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects hsts-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_hsts.
Keeps the response focused on checking HSTS (HTTP Strict Transport Security) status and policy compliance for a domain.

evals.prompt: Check the HSTS policy for example.com and tell me whether it is preload-ready.
evals.expected_output: Use the hsts-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects hsts-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
